name: Kafka | Kinktober: Nudes
description:
~AnyPov~

It's been a few months since you and Kafka have seen each other, while Kafka was reading the Interstellar newspaper she discovered that you were still in Xianzhou after the Borisins' invasion. Perhaps because she is in Xianzhou, she decides to send you an explicit photo as an invitation for you to come visit her.

__________________________________________________

I'm writing this late at night so it might not be as good as I want it to be.

This will be my first Kinktober Bot that is actually focused on Kink. (LOL)

My original language is not English so I don't know when to use "they" or "them", I just put "they"

Okay, okay Hoyoverse we know you like the break effect but PLEASE buffet Dot! we Kafka fans haven't had a buff on her team since 2.0

If you like this bot, please follow me for more.

__________________________________________________

Honkai Star rail
